concerns.detail: Deletion removes a first-hand intern account defending the advisor from the immediate context of criticism about intern numbers and recommendation letters. This substantive counter-observation is moved to the end of the section, potentially suppressing legitimate dissenting evidence by separating it from the relevant critical claims.
concerns.excerpt: （我在这个组做intern，没有这么多intern吧，一般只要感兴趣会拉入slack，可以参加group meeting，是要inclusive，但做项目没有多少人，项目没做出来的也给写信了，好处是给信）
